recommendations.title: Medellin
recommendations.overview: To save his little brother from the hands of dangerous narcos of the Medellín cartel, Reda has a plan that is as simple as it is totally insane: put together a team and raid Colombia. But this adventure is going to get completely out of control when

recommendations.title: Porn in the Hood
recommendations.overview: 3 childhood friends who have never left their hometown in the suburb try to get into porn as a way of earning easy money.

recommendations.title: Vai Que Dá Certo
recommendations.overview: 5 friends have a plan to rob a transporter that can change their lives.

recommendations.title: Triple 9
recommendations.overview: A gang of criminals and corrupt cops plan the murder of a police officer in order to pull off their biggest heist yet across town.

recommendations.title: Serial Driver
recommendations.overview: Pauline has her own way of doing road safety: as a trainer in a point recovery center during the day, she becomes a serial killer of drivers at night.

recommendations.title: The Pickup
recommendations.overview: A routine cash pickup takes a wild turn when mismatched armored truck drivers Russell and Travis are ambushed by ruthless criminals led by savvy mastermind Zoe.

recommendations.title: Danger: Diabolik
recommendations.overview: International man of mystery Diabolik and his sensuous lover Eva Kant pull off heist after heist, all while European cops led by Inspector Ginko and envious mobsters led by Ralph Valmont are closing in on them.

recommendations.title: Taxi 5
recommendations.overview: A police officer who's transfered in the police of Marseille gets assigned to take down a group of Italian robbers who drive the powerfull Ferrari's with the older niece of Daniel, a terrible driver who gets the legendary white taxi.

recommendations.title: The Trip to Spain
recommendations.overview: Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon embark on a road trip along the coast of Spain.

recommendations.title: F9
recommendations.overview: Dominic Toretto and his crew battle the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they've ever encountered: his forsaken brother.
